bacorn-cheese-corn.name: Ba'corn Cheese Corn

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cook bacon in a 10-inch cast iron skillet over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until almost crisp and fat rendered, 7 to 8 minutes.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.

Thoroughly drain thawed corn in a colander. Add ½ corn to the skillet with bacon; cook and stir until kernels just start to turn golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Add green onions, jalapeños, and garlic; cook until vegetables start to soften and sweeten, 3 to 4 minutes. Tilt skillet; drain off some fat, using a paper towel to soak it up.

Season vegetables with salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper; stir in cream and bring to a boil. Stir in remaining ½ corn; cook until heated through. Off heat, stir in about ⅔ each Monterey Jack and mozzarella cheeses to combine; top with remaining ⅓ each Monterey Jack and mozzarella cheeses and pinch cayenne pepper.
Broil in the preheated oven until heated through and top is browned, 5 to 10 minutes.

bas-cheesecake.name: Ba's Cheesecake

ingredients.prep: chocolate wafer cookies, vanilla wafer cookies, or gingersnap cookies
split lengthwise, or 1 Tbsp. vanilla extract

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Pulse 9 oz. graham crackers, chocolate wafer cookies, vanilla wafer cookies, or gingersnap cookies, in the large bowl of a food processor until fine crumbs form (you should have about 2 cups). Add 1 Tbsp. raw sugar and ¼ tsp. kosher salt and pulse just to combine. Add ½ cup (4 oz.) melted butter and pulse until mixture is the consistency of wet sand.

Transfer mixture to springform pan and, using a measuring cup, press crumbs firmly onto bottom and 2" up sides of pan. Bake crust until fragrant and edges just start to take on color, 12–15 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.

Preheat oven to 325°. Pulse 20 oz. cream cheese (2½ 8-oz. bars), room temperature, ¾ cup granulated sugar, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt in the large bowl of a food processor (no need to clean it first), occasionally scraping down sides of the bowl, until smooth. Scrape in the seeds from 1 vanilla bean, split lengthwise (save pod for another use), or add 1 Tbsp. vanilla extract. Add ⅔ cup sour cream, room temperature and ¼ tsp. finely grated lemon zest and pulse until smooth. Add 2 large eggs, room temperature and pulse to combine. Scrape cheesecake batter into cooled crust and bake until edges are set but center is still wobbly, 35–40 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool. Chill until firm, at least 2 hours.
Do ahead: Cheesecake can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in May 2015 as part of BA’s Best, a collection of our essential recipes. Head this way for our favorite chocolate cheesecake, a yogurt-enriched version with a cherry-pie-filling-like topping, or a pumpkin cheesecake with a nut-and-seed crumble.

bacon-and-brussels-burrata-di-bufala-ris.name: Bacon And Brussels Burrata Di Bufala Risotto Burrito
instructions: Risotto: Set the Instant Pot to “Sauté” setting and allow pot to heat up. Melt butter, then add guanciale. Allow guanciale to render and crisp up, 3–4 minutes. Once mostly crisp, add shallot and sauté until softened, 2–3 minutes. Deglaze pot with water and let simmer until mostly reduced. Turn off “Sauté” setting. Stir in carnaroli rice and kosher salt. Mix well to full coat grains in the fat. Stir in chicken stock.
Put the cover on the Instant Pot. Be sure the pressure valve is set to “Sealing.” Use the manual setting to set the timer for 6 minutes.

When the timer goes off, turn pressure valve to “Venting” to release pressure. **Be sure to read all Instant Pot instructions carefully for safety. Be sure Instant Pot is turned off and unplugged before carefully removing the cover. Stir in Parmigiano reggiano.

Brussels sprouts: Preheat oven to 425ºF. Toss Brussels sprouts with a heavy drizzle of olive oil and a sprinkle of kosher salt. Spread out on a sheet tray. Roast for 20–25 minutes, or until crispy. Set aside.
Gremolata: Place all ingredients in a food processor. Process until it becomes a relatively smooth sauce.

Assembly: Place a tortilla on a cutting board or work surface. Spread some gremolata on the tortilla. Place a third of the risotto in a log shape in the center. Top with a generous amount of roasted Brussels sprouts. Tear burrata ball into large pieces and add to the burrito.
Roll up the burrito: Pull the bottom edge of tortilla up over the filling. Fold in the sides, then continue rolling the burrito up.
Brush the outside of the burrito with more gremolata before serving.
Enjoy!

bacon-and-egg-sandwiches-with-pickled-sp.name: Bacon And Egg Sandwiches With Pickled Spring Onions
instructions: Combine onions, vinegar, sugar, salt, and 1 tablespoon water in a small bowl and toss to combine; let stand for 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 350°. Place bacon on a foil-lined large rimmed baking sheet; brush both sides with syrup. Bake until bacon begins to crisp but is still pliable, 20-25 minutes.
Mix mayonnaise and Sriracha in a small bowl to combine; set aside.

Spread 1 side of bread slices with plain mayonnaise. Heat a large skillet over medium-low heat. Working in batches, cook bread, mayonnaise side down, until brown and crisp, about 3 minutes. Wipe out skillet.
Melt butter in same skillet over medium heat; crack eggs into skillet. Cook, occasionally basting with butter in skillet, until whites are set, about 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Spread untoasted side of each bread slice with spicy mayo. Build sandwiches with bread, bacon, eggs, pickled spring onions, and arugula.

bacon-jalapeno-popcorn.name: Bacon Jalapeño Popcorn

ingredients.prep: seeded and cut into thin rings

instructions: Set a large, heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat. Add the bacon and cook until crispy and browned and the fat has rendered, about 8 minutes. Add the jalapeños to the pot and stir well. Cook for 2 minutes, or until the jalapeños are charred. Line a plate with a paper towel and use a slotted spoon to transfer the bacon and jalapeños to the plate. Set aside.

Add the olive oil to the pot and increase the heat to high. Add the popcorn kernels and toss well to coat them in the oil. Spread the kernels evenly on the bottom of the pot, then cover the pot with the lid. When the first kernels start to pop, very slightly uncover the pot. Shake the pot back and forth directly over the heat. Cook until the kernels stop popping, 2 to 3 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat and pour the popcorn into a large bowl. Add the reserved bacon and jalapeños, the Parmesan, and the salt. Toss well to mix. Serve warm.

bacon-tart-with-caramelized-onions-lezze.name: Bacon Tart With Caramelized Onions
instructions: 1. Flour, yogurt, butter, baking powder and salt dough kneading container and knead.
2. Stretch wrapped in the foil and rest in the refrigerator for 20 minutes.
3. 23 cmer of the molds in the scale.

bacon-wrapped-grilled-elk-backstrap.name: Bacon-wrapped Grilled Elk Backstrap
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat.
Season backstrap pieces with liquid smoke and Worcestershire sauce. Sprinkle with garlic powder, onion powder, and pepper. Wrap each piece of meat with a strip of bacon, and place on a metal skewer.
Cook the elk on the preheated grill until the bacon becomes slightly burnt, and the meat has cooked to medium-rare, 15 to 20 minutes.

bagels-with-sesame-seeds-teleculinaria.name: Bagels With Sesame Seeds
instructions: Mix the flour with yeast and sugar and start kneading, adding warm water in thread. Add the pinch of salt, work the dough well, until it becomes elastic and homogeneous, then mold it in ball form, place it in a floured container, cover with a cloth and let it leave in a warm place for 3 hours or even double in volume.

After the time indicated, bring a pot of abundant water to the fire, seasoned with bicarbonate, and let it boil. Form small balls with the leveda dough, pierce them in the center with a finger and cast them in rings.
Lay the bagels in the boiling water, let them cook for about 2 to 3 minutes on each side, then remove them and drain them on vegetable paper.

Lay the bagels on a tray lined with vegetable paper, brush them with the clear beat, sprinkle them with sesame seeds and put them in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 20 minutes. Fill the taste and serve.

baits-with-french-fries-teleculinaria.name: Baits With French Fries

ingredients.item: 500 g pork liver in thin steaks
White pepper and salt in grain

instructions: Peel the garlic teeth and brush them. Wash the life and drain it. Season it with blonde, thyme, salt and pepper. Reserve.
Bring a frying pan with the olive oil, the laurel and garlic. Collect the baits and let fry on both sides.
Water with the wine, boil some and add the vinegar. Remove from the fire, eliminate the blond and sprinkle with the parsley roughly minced. Follow with fries.

baked-fish-medallions-teleculinaria.name: Baked Fish Medallions
instructions: After thawed out, season the hake medallions with lemon juice, salt and pepper.

Peel the onion and garlic teeth, pick them finely and praise them in a pot with the olive oil. Add the tomato, tomato pulp, salt and pepper, stir and let cook everything very well. In the end, remove from the fire, add some basil and crush with the magic wand.

Have the medallions in a refractory container and water them with the previous sauce. Take it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 15 minutes. Then sprinkle the surface with grated cheese and leave it in the oven for a few more minutes until gratin.

baked-lamb-with-potatoes-argiro.name: Baked Lamb With Potatoes

ingredients.item: 21⁄2 kg of lamb preferably from small lam b
21⁄2 kg of lamb preferably from small lam b

instructions: In a bowl, mix the olive oil, lemon, juice and zest, oregano, mustard, salt and pepper.
Beat them with wire, make them look like cream.
Clean, Wash and cut the potatoes.
Add them into the bowl with the liquid entredients and mix well.
Pour the potatoes into a deep pan.
Add the garlic cages with the peel and the thyme bronzes and rosemary.

baked-loin-recipe-with-soy-and-ginger-co.name: Baked Loin Recipe With Soy And Ginger
baked-loin-recipe-with-soy-and-ginger-co.original_name: Receta de lomo al horno con soya y jengibre
instructions: In a large bowl, mix the soy sauce, ginger pitted, garlic, honey, sesame oil and rice vinegar. Put the pork back into a bag with an airtight clasp and pour the marinade. Seal and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3). Remove the back from the marinade and save the liquid.
Put his back on a baking plate and cook for 45-60 minutes and occasionally sprinkle with his reserved marinade. If necessary, cover with aluminium paper to avoid burning.
While the back's cooking, pour the remaining marinade into a small saucer, add the chicken stock and cook over medium heat until the salsa thick.
Once cooked, let the loin stand for 10 minutes before cutting into slices. Serves with salsa, decorated with minced green onions and sesame seeds.

baker-roasted-lamb-teleculinaria.name: Baker-roasted Lamb

ingredients.item: - grells or braised spinach to accompany

instructions: Fix the lamb leg, put it on a tray and season it with salt, pepper, half the garlic chopped, 1 onion, cut into half-moons, the spoon (soup) of colorau, white wine and 1 leaf of blond. Mix well, water with half the oil and let marinate in the cold overnight, turning from time to time.
The next day, bake the meat in the oven, preheated at 180°c for 1 hour, turning and watering from time to time with the sauce itself.

Peel the potatoes, keep them whole (if they are large, cut them into buds) and put them on a tray. Add the remaining chopped garlic and onions, cut into buds. Water with the remaining olive oil, add the other blond leaf, season with salt, pepper and the pinch of colorau and mix well.

Cover the potatoes with foil and put them in the nine for 40 minutes. Remove the paper, gently mix and let it root for another 15 minutes. Serves the lamb leg with rotated potatoes and grills or salted spinach.

banana-bread-with-cheesecake-and-tea-spi.name: Banana Bread With Cheesecake And Tea Spice
banana-bread-with-cheesecake-and-tea-spi.original_name: Cheesecake And Tea Seasoning With Banana Bread
instructions: 1. Mix flour, oatmeal paste, baking powder, kakule, cinnamon, carbonate, carcinnamon, edible and a pinch salt in a large container.
2. Open a pool in the middle of the unlu mixture.
3. Mix two eggs in one container, banana, oil and milk.
4. Cream cheese in another container, two eggs whites remaining, flour, honey and vanilla with the help of mixer.
5. Add the mixture with the flour mixture.
6. Empty the dough into a three-in-oiled oven container.
7. Cream cheese broadcasting with the help of a spoon on the dough in the mold.
8. Pour on the remaining dough.
9. Give the marble image, taking a metal spatula or cream cheese dough with a knife.
10. Bake for 50-60 minutes in the oven preheated 180 degrees.
11. 11. Wait for the mold to cool completely on the tel wire grid.
12. After cooling, wrap the stretch film and wait at a night refrigerator.
12. August Serve by slitting.

banana-chocolate-chip-cupcakes-with-crea.name: Banana Chocolate Chip Cupcakes With Cream Cheese Frosting
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Whisk flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl.

Combine white sugar, brown sugar, and 1/4 cup butter in another bowl; beat with an electric mixer until creamy. Beat in egg. Mix in mashed bananas. Add flour mixture in 3 batches, alternating with buttermilk, stirring after each addition. Fold chocolate chips into the batter.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin tin.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 20 minutes. Cool cupcakes on a wire rack, about 30 minutes.
Beat cream cheese and 3 tablespoons butter in a bowl until smooth. Add vanilla extract. Beat in confectioners' sugar, 1 cup at a time, until frosting is smooth.
Spread frosting over cupcakes.

banana-chocolate-recipe-comedera.name: Banana Chocolate Recipe
banana-chocolate-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de chocolate con plátano fácil
instructions: Take the banana and hit and cut it into pieces.
Add the banana to the blender with milk, sugar and cocoa powder.
He's good till everything's perfectly integrated and you have a consistent milkshake.
Sirve en un vaso con hielo y disfruta.

bao-buns-argiro.name: Bao Buns

ingredients.item: A little flower for the dough
A little flower for the dough

instructions: Mix flower, baking powder, salt and sugar in a bowl.
Open at the center of the mixture a puddle where we pour the yeast dissolved in lukewarm water.
Add the milk, vinegar and oil and mix with a seed until the injectors are unified and the dough is collected around the seed. If necessary, fill in some water.
Remove the duck on a flowered bench and ferment with pulls (such as bread dough) for 10 minutes or until it has a soft and elastic texture. If it sticks to the hands, sprinkle with flour.
Transfer to an oily bowl, cover it and leave it at room temperature for about 2 hours to swell well.
Remove the puffed dough from the bowl and give it a thinks ribbon shape, about 3 cm thinks.
Cut the cord into eight slides and make each slide into a ball. Allow the dough balls to rest on the bench for about 10 minutes.
Then open the dough balls in oval pits, about 4 cm think.
With a brush, gently apply a little oil to the surface.
Carefully fold the oval pies in half, giving the bao buns the characteristic shape of the half moon.
Cut a piece of non-stick paper into eight square pieces and touch on each of a bao bun.
Transfer the bao buns to a baking pan, cover them well and leave them for 11⁄2 hours to rise.
Bake, a few, the bao buns, touching them with the anti-stick paper in a steamer basket for about 8 minutes, until they swell.
We fill them with what we like and enjoy.

basbusha-argiro.name: Basbusha
instructions: Beat the soft button for 2 minutes, with a hand mixer in a large bowl, to fluffy.
Add the sugar and continue the hit for 1-2 minutes until the mixture hangs and the sugar melts.
Add the 2 yoghurts and milk.
Mix the natives with a spatula.
Add the coconut, semolina and baking.
Mix to make the mixture uniform. The mixture will come out pretty soon.
Add the bassbusa to a buttered round shadow baking pan of 38 cm.Let it stand for 15′ on the kitchen counter.
With a knife, we carve out small baklava pieces. On each piece we touch an almond.
Bake in a well rehearsed evening at 180 °C, in residence, in the Bottom grill for 35 ́.

Alternatively, baking in the air on the medium grill at 160 °C for 30 ́. The bassbasa must be well browned up and down before it comes out of the oven. As soon as the bass bowl comes out of the oven, cut the enclosed pieces down with the knife.
Squeeze the hot Sweet with the lukewarm to cold syrup.

basic-air-fryer-hot-dogs.name: Basic Air Fryer Hot Dogs
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place buns in a single layer in the air fryer basket; cook in the preheated air fryer until crisp, about 2 minutes. Remove buns to a plate.
Place hot dogs in a single layer in the air fryer basket; cook for 3 minutes.
Serve hot dogs in toasted buns.

bass-with-herbed-rice-and-coconut-vegeta.name: Bass With Herbed Rice And Coconut-vegetable Chowder

ingredients.item: Finely chopped palm sugar or (packed) dark brown sugar
Baby yukon gold or baby dutch yellow potatoes (about 9 ounces)
X2x1/2-inch pieces striped bass or halibut fillets

instructions: Heat oil in heavy large pot over medium heat. Add next 6 ingredients. Cover and cook until onion is soft, stirring occasionally, about 4 minutes. Add coconut milk and next 4 ingredients and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered 1 hour. Strain into large saucepan, pressing on solids in strainer. If necessary, simmer broth until reduced to 4 cups.

Meanwhile, cook yam cubes in large saucepan of boiling salted water until just tender, 6 to 8 minutes. Using skimmer, transfer yam to bowl. Add Yukon Gold potatoes to same saucepan and cook until just tender, about 10 minutes. Drain; add to bowl with yam. DO AHEAD Broth and potatoes can be made 1 day ahead. Cool, cover separately, and chill.
Bring coconut-carrot broth to simmer over medium heat. Add all cooked potatoes, sugar snap peas, red bell pepper, and carrot. Simmer until all vegetables are tender, 5 to 6 minutes.

Place flour in shallow bowl. Combine 1/2 cup water and egg in another shallow bowl; whisk to blend. Place panko in third shallow bowl. Sprinkle fish pieces with salt and pepper. Coat in flour, then egg mixture, then panko.
Pour enough oil into large nonstick skillet to coat bottom. Heat oil over medium-high heat. Add fish to skillet. Cook until golden and crisp and just opaque in center, about 3 minutes per side.

Pack warm Herbed Rice into 1/2-cup measure. Turn out rice into center of large shallow soup bowl. Repeat 5 more times. Ladle chowder around rice. Top rice with fish. Garnish with basil and/or arugula. Serve, passing lime wedges.

beef-broccoli-chow-mein.name: Beef & Broccoli Chow Mein

ingredients.prep: hong kong style pan fried noodles

instructions: In a 2-cup (480 ml) liquid measuring cup, combine the water, cornstarch, soy sauce, garlic, brown sugar, and white pepper.

In a medium bowl, season the steak strips with salt. Pour half of the sauce over the meat and set the rest aside for later. Mix the sauce with the steak, cover with plastic wrap, and marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to 1 hour.

In a wok or deep skillet over medium-high heat, heat 2 tablespoons of cooking oil, then add the par-cooked noodles. Cook for 1-2 minutes, allowing the noodles to crisp, then flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes. Transfer to a plate and set aside.

In the same wok, add 1 tablespoon of cooking oil and the marinated beef. Cook the beef for 3-4 minutes, then flip and cook for another 2 minutes, or until slightly crispy. Remove from the wok and set aside.
In the same wok, heat the remaining tablespoon of oil and add onion and broccoli. Season with salt, then stir and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the onions are translucent.

Return the steak to the wok, followed by the crispy noodles and sesame oil. Mix well and pour in the reserved sauce. Toss gently and cook for another 2-3 minutes, or until everything is well-combined. Garnish with sliced scallions.
Enjoy!

beef-and-mushroom-crostini-with-thyme.name: Beef And Mushroom Crostini With Thyme
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Sprinkle steaks with salt and pepper. Add to skillet and cook to desired doneness, 4 to 5 minutes per side for medium-rare, depending on thickness. Transfer steaks to plate to cool.

Add 3 remaining tablespoons oil to same skillet. Add garlic; stir 30 seconds. Add mushrooms and 1 tablespoon chopped thyme; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Sauté until mushrooms are tender and brown, stirring often, about 10 minutes. Add Sherry; cook until liquid is absorbed, scraping up any browned bits, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Steaks and mushroom mixture can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap separately; refrigerate. Let stand at room temperature 30 minutes before continuing.

Thinly slice steaks. Spread goat cheese over each baguette slice. Place steak slice atop cheese. Divide mushroom mixture among crostini, pressing lightly to adhere. Sprinkle crostini with remaining 1 tablespoon chopped thyme. Arrange on platter; garnish with thyme sprigs.

beef-broth-recipe-comedera.name: Beef Broth Recipe

ingredients.item: 1  kilo de carne de vaca con hueso (ya en pedazos (ossobuco, chambarete o jarrete))
Sal y pimienta negra en polvo

instructions: Para comenzar, vamos a picar la pulpa de calabaza en trozos, de preferencia en cubos.
Haremos lo mismo con las papas. Antes de picarlas, hay que decidir si pelarlas o no. Yo prefiero lavarlas bien y dejarles la piel.
In the case of herbal branches, we have to make sure that they are well clear, preferably passed by water mixed with vinegar.
We're also gonna peel the onion, as are carrots. We'll cut these last ones into tires.
Then we'll peel our garlic teeth. We will also peel the corn minks and pint each at about five wheels.
En el caso de la calabacita, le quitaremos la rama, la lavaremos bien y la cortaremos en rodajas.

The meat should be cooked (the easiest thing to do is to boil them 35 minutes into a pressure pot). Remove any pieces of fat that may have been glued and put them into a pot with water, onion and garlic.
To remove another part of the fat from the flesh, we will boil and remove a layer of white foam that will form onto the surface of water.
After that step, we will leave this stock in cooking for an hour with the pot covered and with medium heat.

After that time, we'll start adding the plants. We will start with the pieces of corn seedling, and we will let them cook up to the point at which the meat becomes soft. That should normally take about 30 more minutes.

Once that time has passed, we will have to fish the garlic and onion teeth in the stock to get them out and replace them with potatoes, carrots, branches of herbs and pumpkin (I hope I have nothing been forgotten). We will also add salt and pepper to our taste.

We will let the broth cook for another half an hour, and then add the pumpkin, an ingredient that gets rid of with ease, and therefore should not be cooked for a long time. If the pumpkin pulp they chose is very mature and tends to get rid of, they can also wait to this extent to add it, rather than at the same time as carrots. Also add chickpeas.

From this point, cook for an additional 15 minutes or until carrots are soft. Before you put out the pot, try the stock to see that it's salty enough and if not, fix the date with more salt and / or pepper.

beef-stew-with-black-bay-leaves-argiro.name: Beef Stew With Black Bay Leaves

ingredients.item: 1 Branch of fresh thyme or a little dry
1 Branch of fresh thyme or a little dry

instructions: we will use a small pot that enters the kitchen eye or pot that enters the evening (without plastic handles).
Add 1 tablespoon from the total olive oil of the relief to the pot and sauce the chopped panceta for 3 minutes, until it smalls and without getting any color.
Add the remaining olive oil and sauté the beef ports until they are crusted from all sides for 4 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and stir for 5 minutes, until the onion is polarized.
Then add the paste by mixing and rubbing with spatula or seed to spread to the base of the hall.
Add the cognac first and immediately with the blackwash.
Decorate with spatula, i.e. scratch and rub the caramelized, solidified juices of the pot by dissolving them with the wine.
Add the red wine, the Laurel, orange peel and thyme.
Cut the tomatoes in half and tighten to remove their eyes and liquids.
Cut them back in half and pour them into the food.
Add salt and pepper, cover the sauce and in a preheated evening at 170 °C in residence, make the beef for 12 hours.
If you want thicker and tied sauce, then after the beef is cooked and melted, transfer it to a platter and bottle the sauce in the kitchen eye in a strong heat until it thinks and reduces its volume.
Pour the beef with our sauce.

beef-with-mushrooms-and-white-sauce-argi.name: Beef With Mushrooms And White Sauce
beef-with-mushrooms-and-white-sauce-argi.original_name: Μοσχάρι με μανιτάρια και άσπρη σάλτσα
instructions: Start by cutting the meat into 2 fillets and add salt and pepper.
Rinse the dried mushrooms and soak them with 1/2 cup of hot water for 15 minutes.
Drain and keep their liquid (after drying it on a fine sheet).
Heat the olive oil in a small pan.
Add the meat for 3–4′′ on each side.
Add the onion and garlic. We let them wither for 2'-3'.
Remove the garlic.
Add the fresh and dried mushrooms and thyme.
Add the liquid that soaked the mushrooms.
Lower the heat and cover the pan.
Cook for about 15 minutes, soften the beef and something its sauce.

beer-battered-tempura-zucchini-and-eggpl.name: Beer-battered Tempura Zucchini And Eggplant
beer-battered-tempura-zucchini-and-eggpl.original_name: Calabacín y berenjena en tempura rebozados con cerveza
instructions: Wash eggplants and cut them into rods about 1 cm wide. In a bowl, mix the rice flour, corn flour, salt, garlic powder, black pepper and cumin powder. Add gluten-free beer to the flour mix and stir till a uniform dough remains. If the mixture's too thick, you can add some more beer. Warm up enough oil in a deep frying pan or frying pan at 180 and 3. Cover the eggplant cane in the mixture of beer and flour dough. Fry the eggplant sticks into hot oil, till they are golden and crispy. Put eggplant cane onto absorbing paper to remove excess oil.

Wash pumpkins and cut them into rods about 1 cm wide. In a bowl, mix wheat flour, corn flour, salt, garlic powder and black pepper. Add the beer to the flour mix and stir till a uniform mass remains. If the mixture's too thick, you can add some more beer. Warm up enough oil in a deep frying pan or frying pan at 180 and 3. Cover the pumpkin rods with a mixture of beer and flour. Fry the pumpkin sticks into hot oil, till they are golden and crispy. Put pumpkin cane onto absorbing paper to remove excess oil.

beet-hummus.name: Beet Hummus
instructions: Combine beets, chickpeas, lemon juice, tahini, garlic, salt, and cumin in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until pureed. Pour reserved chickpea liquid in slowly, with the processor running, until hummus is smooth and desired consistency is achieved.

beet-salad-with-yogurt-and-garlic-argiro.name: Beet Salad With Yogurt And Garli c

ingredients.item: 2 medium raw betroots or fornicated (I prefer to be raw)
2 medium raw betroots or fornicated (I prefer to be raw)

instructions: Clean with gloves and rub the beet in a fine scrub.
In a small bowl with yogurt and garlic.
Add all other ingredients, yoghurt, garlic grated, salt, vintage, dill, olive oil.
Mix well, homogenize the ingredients and become ointment.
Depending on how red your eyes are, the intensity of the color divers.
The raw beet gives intense pink color to the beet salad, while the boated gives softer.
It is eaten like dip or accompanies all grilled meat and culture.

beets-with-goat-cheese-nigella-seeds-and.name: Beets With Goat Cheese, Nigella Seeds, And Pistachios

ingredients.item: Nigella seeds are available at indian markets or online.

instructions: Toast pistachios in a dry small skillet over medium-high heat, stirring often, until golden brown, about 5 minutes; let cool.

Combine ¼ cup vinegar, ½ tsp. paprika, and a pinch of kosher salt in a large saucepan and add water so mixture comes 1” up sides of pan. Fit with a steamer basket and bring liquid to a simmer over medium. Add beets, cover pan, and steam until tender, 30–40 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl and let cool slightly.

While beets are still warm, add 2 oz. goat cheese, remaining 1 Tbsp. vinegar, and remaining ¼ tsp. paprika; season with kosher salt and pepper. Coarsely smash beets with a fork or potato masher, leaving some bigger pieces.
Serve topped with nigella seeds, pistachios, sea salt, and remaining goat cheese and drizzled with oil.

belgian-squirrel.name: Belgian Squirrel
instructions: Clean squirrels, making sure that all shot is removed. Burn away with a candle any fur that clings. Rinse the meat though several changes of water and pat dry. Cut squirrels into serving pieces.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add squirrel pieces and fry until browned on all sides, but do not cook through. Remove the squirrel pieces to a large Dutch oven or oven safe crock. Add onions to the butter in the skillet; cook and stir until tender and browned. Pour the onions and butter into the pot with the squirrel. Fill with enough water to almost cover the meat. Mix in the vinegar and season with thyme, salt and pepper. Cover and place in the oven.
Bake for 1 hour in the preheated oven. Remove the pot from the oven and add the prunes. Return to the oven and reduce the heat to 163°C (165 degrees C). Continue baking for another 45 minutes.

Remove the pot from the oven. Mix the flour and cold water together in a cup. Use a slotted spoon to remove the meat and prunes to a serving dish. Set the pot on the stove and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Stir in the flour and water and simmer, stirring constantly, until the gravy is thick enough to coat a metal spoon. Serve meat with a lot of gravy.

bethanys-valentine-cut-out-sugar-cookies.name: Bethany's Valentine Cut Out Sugar Cookies
instructions: Cream together the butter, sugar, egg, milk, vanilla extract, and almond extract in a large bowl.
Stir in the flour and baking powder.
Cover and refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.
Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Divide the dough into thirds. On a lightly floured surface, roll out each portion to 1/4-inch thick.
Cut cookies out using a floured cookie cutter.
Arrange cookies on an ungreased baking sheet about 1-inch apart.
Bake until cookies are lightly golden, 6 to 9 minutes.
Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.

big-soft-ginger-cookies.name: Big Soft Ginger Cookies
instructions: Sift flour, ginger, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, and salt into a bowl.

Beat butter and remaining 1 cup sugar in a separate large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in egg, then stir in molasses and water. Gradually stir the sifted ingredients into the molasses mixture until well combined.
Use floured hands to shape dough into 24 walnut-sized balls. Roll each ball in the reserved sugar until coated.
Place cookies 2 inches apart onto un-greased cookie sheets, and flatten slightly with the bottom of a glass.
Bake in the preheated oven until tops are cracked but centers are still soft, about 8 to 10 minutes, switching racks halfway through.
Remove from the oven and allow cookies to cool on the baking sheets for 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Enjoy!

biscuit-cake-with-condensed-milk-telecul.name: Biscuit Cake With Condensed Milk
biscuit-cake-with-condensed-milk-telecul.original_name: Bolo de bolacha com leite condensado

ingredients.item: Physalis and fresh mint to decorate

instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water for 5 minutes, drain and melt into the microwave without letting it boil. Place 600 ml of cream into a bowl and hit them in firm whipped cream.
Adicione o leite condensado cozido e envolva. Adicione as folhas de gelatina ao creme e envolva bem. Disponha um aro de 22 cm em cima de um prato.

Drop cookies in coffee and distribute them inside the rim, intercalating with cream. Repeat the layers until the biscuits and cream are finished. Take it to the fridge for an hour until it solidifies. Cover the cookie cake with the remaining 200 ml of whipped cream in whipped cream with 20 g of sugar and take it to the fridge for another 1 hour.
Decorate with physalis and mint and serve fresh.

biscuit-lemon-parfait-lezzet.name: Biscuit Lemon Parfait

ingredients.item: 3 grated bark and water of lemon
8-10 oats biscuits (can also use cotton biscuit)

instructions: 1. Freshen with lemon parfe with biscuits! Get creamy and milk deep rough.
2. Cook until the mixer is dark and wait until it cool well in the refrigerator.
3. Take the hands of eggs waiting at room temperature.
4. Take a deep rough and add powder sugar, lemon peel and lemon juice.
5. Beat 5 minutes with mixer.
6. Add the mixture in the refrigerator and continue to cook 1-2 minutes with the mixer.
7. Cook eggs in a separate container until they become snow.
8. Then add the eggs mice to the creamy mixture and mix it with the spatula.
9. Finally add the biscuits you have made into the robot and mix again.
10.   Cover a mold with stretch film and close it with the stretch film of the parfe mixture and over.
11.  Buzlukta 1 gece bekletin.
12. Remove the mold from the ice before 10 minutes before serving and remove it from the reverse servis die to the service plate.
12. August Decorate the above lemon slices and blueberry with biscuits and slice and serve without waiting.
14 July Lemon is a natural antibiotic.
15. We take plenty of benefits of lemon in diseases such as cold, nezle, flu.
16. You can find a different version of chocolate parfe recipe here.

black-forest-layer-cake.name: Black Forest Layer Cake
instructions: Heat milk and chocolate in a small saucepan over medium-low, whisking often, until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth. Cover and chill.
Do Ahead: Soak can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Place ½ cup cold water in a small bowl and sprinkle gelatin evenly over top; chill until ready to use.

Place chocolate and salt in a large wide bowl. Heat milk and corn syrup in a small saucepan over medium, whisking to combine, until steaming and barely simmering around the edges of pan. Remove from heat and add softened gelatin, whisking until dissolved. Reheat milk mixture briefly over medium-low (do not let it boil), then pour over chocolate mixture and let sit 1 minute. Gently whisk until smooth; reserve saucepan.

Heat cream in reserved saucepan over medium just until warm to the touch, about 1 minute. Gradually stream cream into chocolate mixture, whisking constantly until incorporated and smooth. You should have around 4 cups ganache. Cover and chill until set, at least 4 hours.
Do Ahead: Ganache can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Line a 9"-diameter cake pan or springform pan with plastic wrap, pressing into bottom and leaving generous overhang. Fit a 1-piece round of cake into pan, placing bottom side up. Using a pastry brush, dab a quarter of soak across entire surface of cake. Spread a third of cherry preserves over with a small offset spatula. Stir chilled ganache to loosen, then scrape a third over cherry preserves and smooth into an even layer. Place another round of cake on top of ganache, bottom side up, this time using a 2-piece layer. Repeat soaking and filling process. Top with the remaining 2-piece round of cake, bottom side up, and repeat soaking and filling process one more time. Top with remaining 1-piece round of cake, bottom side up, and brush with remaining soak. You should have 4 layers of soaked cake separated by 3 layers of filling. Wrap plastic overhang up and over cake; chill at least 12 hours and up to 2 days to allow ganache to set and cake to absorb soak.

To frost, remove plastic from top of cake and invert cake onto a cake plate or platter. Remove pan and plastic. Dollop about 1 cup buttercream over top of cake and smooth across top and down sides, creating a very thin base layer. You want to fill in any gaps, adhere any crumbs to the cake, and seal in the fillings (this is called a crumb coat). Chill cake 10 minutes, then scrape remaining frosting on top of cake and spread all over, working down and around sides. Decorate as desired.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 2 days ahead. Chill until frosting sets; then cover loosely with plastic wrap. Let sit at room temperature 1–1½ hours before slicing.
Highly recommended reading: Layer cake tips, tricks, and common mistakes from Natasha Pickowicz.

black-sesamepear-tea-cake.name: Black Sesame–pear Tea Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Butter one 9x5x3-inch loaf pan or six 4x2x2-inch paper or metal loaf pans. Whisk 1½ cups flour, next 4 ingredients, and 2 Tbsp. sesame seeds in a medium bowl. Grind remaining ½ cup sesame seeds in spice mill to form a thick paste, about 2 minutes.

Using an electric mixer, beat ½ cup butter and 1⅓ cups sugar in a large bowl until well combined, 2–3 minutes. Add sesame paste and beat, occasionally scraping down sides of bowl, until blended, 1–2 minutes. Add egg and egg yolk. Beat until pale and fluffy, 3–4 minutes. On low speed, beat in flour mixture in 3 additions, alternating with buttermilk in 2 additions, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Toss pear with remaining 2 Tbsp. flour in a small bowl; fold into batter.
Spoon batter into prepared pan; smooth top. Sprinkle with remaining 2 Tbsp. sugar.
Bake until a tester comes out clean when inserted into center, about 1 hour 40 minutes for large loaf and 45–55 minutes for small loaves. Let cool in pans on a wire rack.

blackberry-farm-griddle-cakes.name: Blackberry Farm Griddle Cakes
instructions: Whisk egg, buttermilk, and maple syrup in a small bowl. Whisk oat flour, cornmeal, rice flour, buckwheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
Whisk buttermilk mixture into dry ingredients, then whisk in butter until no lumps remain.

Heat a large nonstick or cast-iron skillet over medium heat; lightly brush with oil. Working in batches, pour batter by 1/4-cupfuls into skillet. Cook until bottoms are browned and bubbles form on top of griddle cakes, about 3 minutes. Flip and cook until griddle cakes are cooked through, about 2 minutes longer.

blt-egg-salad.name: Blt Egg Salad
instructions: Place eggs in a large saucepan over medium heat and cover with 1 inch water. Bring to a boil, cover, remove from heat, and set aside in hot water for 10 minutes. Drain; run under cold water to stop the cooking. Peel eggs, then chop.
Gently fold eggs, mayonnaise, Cheddar cheese, green onions, mustard, and black pepper together in a large bowl until evenly mixed. Fold in bacon and tomatoes.
Place salad and lettuce between 2 bread slices to make a sandwich. Repeat with remaining salad, lettuce, and bread slices.

blt-with-spicy-pepper-cream-cheese.name: Blt With Spicy Pepper Cream Cheese

ingredients.item: Head red or green leaf lettuce

instructions: Preheat oven to 93°C. Line 2 half-sheet trays with parchment paper.

Toss tomatoes with olive oil, sugar, salt, pepper and thyme leaves in a large bowl. Spread on a lined half-sheet tray and slow-roast, stirring every hour, until little to no liquid remains and the tomatoes are shriveled and caramelized, about 3 hours 30 minutes. Set aside and raise oven temperature to 191°C.

Arrange bacon slices side-by-side on a lined half-sheet tray and cook to desired doneness, 20 to 25 minutes for just under crispy. Carefully remove from oven (watch out for hot bacon fat!) and drain on paper towels.

Slice and toast bagels. Spread 2 tablespoons Spicy Pepper Cream Cheese on each bagel half. Arrange 6 to 8 pieces roasted tomatoes on the bottom halves. Top each with 3 leaves lettuce, torn to fit. Divide the bacon among the top halves, ripping the pieces in half to fit the tops. Close, slice and enjoy. (See Cook's Note.)
Whip cream cheese in a stand mixer or in a large bowl with a hand mixer until light, about 2 minutes. Add chopped peppers, salt and pepper flakes and mix on low to blend.

blueberry-and-banana-cream-cheese-pie.name: Blueberry And Banana Cream Cheese Pie

ingredients.item: Recipe pastry for a 9 inch single crust pie

instructions: Press pecans into unbaked pie shells. Bake at 177°C (175 degrees C) until light brown.
Slice bananas into cooled crusts.
Cream sugar and cream cheese together. Add nondairy whipped topping to cream cheese mixture. Pour mixture over bananas in both pie pans.
Top pies with blueberries. Chill at least 4 hours before serving, or freeze for later use. Enjoy!

bobbies-oatmeal-cookies.name: Bobbie's Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease cookie sheets.

In a large bowl, cream together butter, brown sugar and white sugar until smooth. Beat in eggs and vanilla. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; stir into the creamed mixture. Mix in the oats, chocolate chips, raisins, and pecans, one ingredient at a time. Drop by rounded spoonfuls onto the prepared cookie sheets.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes in the preheated oven. Allow cookies to cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

boiled-peanuts.name: Boiled Peanuts
instructions: 1 In a 10- to 12-quart stockpot, stir 1/2 cup salt into 2 gallons of water until the salt dissolves, and add the raw peanuts. Use a large dinner plate or two to help submerge the floating peanuts. Allow to soak for 8 hours or overnight. (This step saves a little time boiling, and thus fuel, but if you don't have the luxury of time, skip this step. Skip it also if you're using green peanuts.)

2 Drain the soaking water and fill the pot of peanuts with 2 gallons of fresh water and the remaining cup of salt. Note the level of the water on the side of the pot. Bring to a boil, reduce the heat to low, and simmer, covered, for 6 to 8 hours (or 2 to 3 hours for green peanuts), keeping the water in the pot within an inch or so of its original level with regular additions of water, until the peanuts are soft as a roasted chestnut or softer.

3 When the peanuts have boiled for 3 hours (or 1 hour for green peanuts), sample them to check their texture and salinity. Remove a peanut, and when it is cool enough to handle, crack open the shell and give the kernel a chew, slurping some brine with it. If the peanut crunches, it should be cooked further. If the brine lacks enough salt, add by 1/4-cup amounts; if it is too salty, remove a portion of the water and replace with the same volume of fresh water. Allow an hour for the salinity to equalize before testing again. Sample every hour until the peanuts are pleasantly yielding and as salty and appetizing as a good pickle.

4 When the peanuts are cooked to your satisfaction, turn off the heat and allow them to cool in the pot for an hour (or 30 minutes for green peanuts). When cool enough to handle, drain and eat immediately or store in the shell, in a sealed container, in the refrigerator or freezer. (Boiled peanuts will keep for 7 to 10 days in the refrigerator and for several months in the freezer.)

boletus-or-porcini-risotto-pequerecetas.name: Boletus Or Porcini Risotto

ingredients.item: 320 g de arroz arborio o carnaroli (unas 2 tazas)
300 g de boletus frescos o 30 g de boletus secos (rehidratados)
1 litro de caldo de verduras o de pollo
40 g de queso parmesano rallado (4 cucharadas)
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: If we use dry pits, we rehydrate them in hot water for 20 minutes. We reserve both the boletus and the frying fluid, that we can add to the stock to enhance the taste.
We stung the onion and garlic. In a large frying pan or pan, we heated 3 tablespoons of olive oil and soften the onion at medium heat until clear.
We added the clawed boletes and we leapt them a few minutes till they release their smell. We'll have to have 100 ml of white wine and let him evaporate his alcohol.
Incorporamos los 320 g de arroz y lo rehogamos 1 o 2 minutos, removiendo sin parar.
We will add hot stock (about 1 liter) little by little, one tablespoon at a time, while at once mooring. When the rice has absorbed the liquid, we add another, and so on for about 18-20 minutes.
When the rice is at the dente and with creamy texture, we withdraw from the fire. We add 40 g of butter and 40 g of parmesan pitted. We mix well so that it looks bright and creamy.
Echamos sal y pimienta al gusto, lo tapamos y dejamos reposar 2 minutos antes de servir.

breaded-fish-medallions-teleculinaria.name: Breaded Fish Medallions
instructions: Disengage the hake medallions and season them with lemon juice, salt and pepper.

Peel off the onion and garlic teeth, pick them up and saute them in a pot with the hot olive oil. Add the tomato and coriander to taste, season with salt and pepper, cook for 15 minutes, then add the flour, previously dissolved in a little water, and let it boil for another 5 minutes. Remove from the fire, crush and reserve.

Have the fish medallions on a tray, water them with the sauce and put them in the oven for 20 minutes, then remove them from the oven, sprinkle them with grated cheese and then put them back in the oven for another 5 minutes or until it is coloured. Remove from the oven and serve decorated to taste.

breakfast-sliders.name: Breakfast Sliders

ingredients.item: Dinner rolls or hawaiian sweet rolls

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C).

Slice the rolls in half lengthwise. Place the bottom half in a 9 x 13-inch (23 x 33 cm) rimmed baking dish. Spread the eggs evenly over the rolls, then add the ham, cheddar, bacon, and spinach. Top with the remaining rolls.
Brush the tops of the rolls with melted butter and sprinkle the pepper on top. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown. Slice into individual sliders, then serve.
Enjoy!

brigadeiros-teleculinaria.name: Brigadeiros
instructions: Coloque todos os ingredientes indicados numa panela funda, exceto o chocolate granulado.
Take it to the fire and let it cook, in medium heat, always stirring until the dough comes out of the pan. Remove from the fire and let it cool well.
With hands greased with margarine, mold small balls with the dough and then wrap them in chocolate granules. Put it in paper forms and take it to the cold until it serves.

brisas-do-liz-convent-recipe-teleculinar.name: Brisas Do Liz - Convent Recipe
instructions: Unte forminhas de queques com margarina e polvilhe-as com farinha. Reserve. Ligue o forno a 180 graus.
Light the water with sugar until you get a pearl point. In a bowl, stir the yolks and then add the previous preparation in thread, stirring slowly.

Finally, add the almond, stir and distribute into the forms. Place on a tray with water so that it reaches about 1/3 of the height of the shapes. Take it in the oven for 25 minutes. Take it off, let it cool down and unshape it.

british-date-and-walnut-loaf-cake.name: British Date And Walnut Loaf Cake
instructions: Place dates and margarine in a bowl with boiling water and baking soda. Gently mix with a wooden spoon until margarine has melted and dates are plumped up. Let cool to room temperature, at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line a 2-pound loaf pan with parchment paper.
Combine flour, brown sugar, and walnuts in a separate bowl. Add to bowl with the date mixture. Mix well with a wooden spoon. Add egg and mix in. Spoon mixture into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 60 to 75 minutes. Let cool on a wire rack.

brussels-sprout-tacos.name: Brussels Sprout Tacos

ingredients.item: . aleppo-style pepper or 1 tbsp. crushed red pepper flakes

ingredients.prep: sliced serrano chiles, cilantro leaves with tender stems, flaky sea salt, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Heat a small saucepan over medium. When hot, pour in 1 Tbsp. fish sauce. It should bubble up vigorously and then get thicker and slightly darker, about 30 seconds. Repeat with remaining fish sauce, incorporating 1 Tbsp. at a time. Carefully add vinegar (it may spatter), then transfer mixture to a small bowl; let cool. Stir in scallions and ginger. Taste and season with salt.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.
Purée red pepper and ¾ cup whole peanuts in a food processor until a smooth butter forms, about 2 minutes. Season with kosher salt and scrape into a small bowl.

Very thinly slice one-fourth of brussels sprouts; transfer to a medium bowl. Cut remaining brussels sprouts in half. Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Shallow-fry halved brussels sprouts in batches, being careful not to overcrowd the pan, until browned and crisp, about 5 minutes per batch. Transfer to paper towels to drain, then add to sliced brussels sprouts. Drizzle with ¼ cup Salty-Sour Vinaigrette and toss to coat; season with kosher salt.

To serve, heat a medium skillet over medium-high. Working one at a time, cook tortillas just until warmed through; transfer to plates. Spread tortillas with some spicy peanut butter; spoon brussels sprouts over. Top with onion, avocado, chiles, cilantro, and ¼ cup crushed peanuts; sprinkle with sea salt. Serve with lime wedges.

bubble-tea-with-tapioca-pearls-bubble-te.name: Bubble Tea With Tapioca Pearls (bubble Tea)
bubble-tea-with-tapioca-pearls-bubble-te.original_name: Té de burbujas con perlas de tapioca (Bubble Tea)

ingredients.item: 2 bags of black tea (or 6 g of loose black tea)
150 ml de leche (la que uses habitualmente)
2 tablespoons of brown sugar (suit to taste)
40 g apioca beads (you can buy them here)

instructions: First prepare the tapioca pearls: put 500 ml of water to boil and add the 40 g of dry pearls to remove them. When the pearls rise to the surface, put the fire down half and cook for 20-30 minutes, stirring from time to time, and have to be completely translucent.
When they seem about ready, put out the fire, cover up the pot and let the pearls stand 10-15 minutes to finish with residual heat.

Meanwhile, prepare tea: boils 250 ml of water and removes it from fire. Infusiona 2 bags of black tea (or 6 g of loose black tea) for 5 minutes to be strong and aromatic. Fold the tea and, if you want to sweeten it already, dissolve 2 tablespoons of brown sugar into the still hot tea and better penetrate the mixture.

When the pearls have been resting, scrape them and put them to a bowl with a quick syrup so that they get sweeter and do not stick: they heat up 50 ml of water with 1 tablespoon of sugar to dissolve, pour onto the pearls and remove. Let them get a little cold, and the pearls are juicy and with a characteristic chewy spot. If you prefer more sweet, you can increase to 2 tablespoons at the syrup.

Rig the glass: put on two high cups put the already temperate pearls (about 40-50 g of baked pearls per glass), adds 4-5 cubes of ice, pits black and complete tea with 150 ml of milk or vegetable milk above.

buns-without-puffing-argiro.name: Buns Without Puffing
instructions: In the mixer's bowl, add the sugar, butter, yeast, milk, eggs, zest and machete. Mix the sugar to dissolve.
We work with the dough hook.
Place the flower at low speed.
Work the dough in the mixer for 10 minutes.
The dough must be soft soft and supple and not stick to the hands. The dough with patience can also be brought with the hands, without a mixer.
Dip your hands into melted butter and grab the dough.
We split it into three pieces.
We're building three little pies in whatever shape we want.
Place them in a sheet coated with non-stick baking paper.
Mix an egg yolk and a few drops of water and spread the pies.
Put them in the evening in the lower grill resistors at 50
Turn the evening on 180°C and make for about 25 minutes to brown and puff.

burgers-with-lots-of-vegetables-argiro.name: Burgers With Lots Of Vegetables

ingredients.item: 2 tabletspoons fresh herbs (parsley and mint) finely chopped
2 tabletspoons fresh herbs (parsley and mint) finely chopped

instructions: Wash the vegetarians, clean them and rub them on the fine scrubber. Alternatively, we paste them in the blender.
Place the minced meat in a bowl and sprinkle with the vintage.
Add the fine ground vegetarians, herbs, Oregon some salt and, if you like, add some pepper and sprinkle with the olive oil.
Ferment the olderents very well and gradually incorporated the oats by kneading until the minced meat is stable and easily formed.
If we have time, leave the mixture of fined meat in the refrigerator for a while, to stand and remove its flavors.
Wet or oil our hands slightly and make the mixture in small burgers.
Bake them in a cologne over medium to high heat for about 7 minutes on each side.
We regularly turn the burgers into the pan to turn evening, but we don't push them with the spatula.
Serve the juicy burgers with vegetable chewed potatoes or use them to make delicate burgers that children love.

butter-chicken.name: Butter Chicken

ingredients.prep: steamed basmati rice, and naan (for serving)

instructions: Whisk yogurt, garlic, fenugreek leaves, if using, ginger, and salt in a medium bowl. Add chicken and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 1 hour and up to 3.

Melt 4 Tbsp. butter in a large wide pot over medium heat. Cook cinnamon, cardamom pods, clove, and fenugreek seeds, if using, stirring, until slightly darker and fragrant, 1–2 minutes. Add onion and chiles, season with salt, and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is golden and beginning to caramelize, 8–10 minutes. Add garlic and ginger and cook, stirring, until very fragrant and ginger starts to turn golden and sticks to bottom of pot, 2–3 minutes. Add fenugreek leaves, if using, garam masala, paprika, and turmeric and cook, stirring, until very fragrant, about 1 minute. Add tomatoes, breaking up into pieces with a spoon, and cook until brick red and most of the liquid is evaporated, about 1 minute. Using a potato masher or large spoon, smash tomatoes and continue to simmer, uncovered, until sauce is the consistency of a thick ragù, 40–50 minutes. Discard cinnamon stick (leave other whole spices).

Transfer mixture to a blender and purée until smooth. Cut remaining 4 Tbsp. butter into pieces. Add butter and cream to blender and purée until creamy; season with salt. Return sauce to pot and bring to a simmer.

Meanwhile, preheat broiler. Arrange chicken in a single layer on a wire rack set inside a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet. Broil until chicken starts to brown in spots (it will not be cooked through), 7–8 minutes per side. When cool enough to handle, cut into ¾" pieces. Add chicken to simmering sauce, cover, and cook until chicken is cooked through, 8–10 minutes.

Top chicken and sauce with cilantro. Serve with rice and naan alongside.
Do Ahead: Butter chicken can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

butterscotch-pie-with-curry-crust.name: Butterscotch Pie With Curry Crust
instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 325°. Toast fennel seeds in a small dry skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a small plate; let cool, then finely chop.

Pulse cookies in a food processor until very fine crumbs form (you should have about 2 cups). Add fennel seeds, flour, raw sugar, curry powder, and salt and pulse to combine. Add butter and pulse until mixture is the consistency of wet sand.

Transfer mixture to a 9” pie dish. Using a measuring cup, press firmly onto bottom and up sides of pie dish. Place pie dish on a rimmed baking sheet and bake crust, rotating halfway through, until dry and set, 20–25 minutes. Transfer pie dish to a wire rack and let crust cool.
DO AHEAD: Crust can be baked 1 day ahead. Store wrapped tightly at room temperature.
Place gelatin and 2 Tbsp. milk in a small bowl; let stand until gelatin is softened, 5–10 minutes.

Place granulated sugar in a medium saucepan; scrape in seeds from vanilla bean and add pod. Cook over medium heat, stirring, until sugar is melted, then cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture turns amber in color, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and slowly add cream (mixture will bubble vigorously), stirring until smooth. Return to heat and add ½ cup brown sugar and remaining milk. Cook, stirring, until sugar is dissolved and caramel mixture begins to steam, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat, add baking soda, and whisk until bubbles subside; remove pod and discard.

Whisk egg yolks, cornstarch, and remaining ¼ cup brown sugar in a medium bowl. Gradually whisk in half of warm caramel mixture. Pour egg-yolk mixture into caramel mixture in saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat, whisking constantly; reduce heat to low and cook, whisking constantly, until thickened, 2 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in gelatin mixture, butter, molasses, and salt, whisking until butter is melted and mixture is smooth. Transfer filling to a large bowl and chill, stirring occasionally, until slightly cooled and thickened, about 1 hour. (Stirring and cooling pudding before chilling in crust will give it a luscious, creamy texture.)
Pour butterscotch filling into crust, smoothing top if needed. Chill until set, at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, spoon whipped cream over pie and top with cashews.
DO AHEAD: Pie can be made (without whipped cream) 2 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.
